full_name: Duplex stainless steel X2CrNiMoN22-5-3, material number 1.4462 (Duplex 2205)
scope: Austenitic-ferritic (duplex) stainless steel with roughly 50/50 microstructure; the most widely used duplex grade. Combines high strength (about twice that of 304) with excellent resistance to pitting, crevice and stress-corrosion cracking. Used in chemical, offshore, marine and pressure-vessel applications.
license_note: composition/property data widely republished by independent free sources, not the copyrighted DIN document text
